# Puneet Srivastava — Professional Profile
# puneetsrivastava.com
# Updated: June 2026

Puneet Srivastava is a pricing strategist,
builder, and creator based in Pflugerville,
Texas. He is Senior Director of Pricing
Strategy and Intelligence at Cohesity, a
pre-IPO data management and cybersecurity
company.

BACKGROUND

Puneet studied Material Science with a
minor in Computer Science at IIT Kanpur
(1996-2000) and completed his MBA in
General Management at IIM Ahmedabad
(2002-2004) with an exchange semester
at HHL Leipzig, Germany.

Career timeline:
2000-2002: Infosys, Bangalore — Software
  Engineer, Goldman Sachs trade processing
2004-2006: Coca-Cola — Area Sales Manager
2006-2007: Marketics — Domain Consultant,
  Analytics
2007-2012: Dell India — Consultant to
  Senior Manager
2012-2022: Dell Round Rock, Texas —
  Senior Manager to Director
2022-present: Cohesity — Senior Director,
  Pricing Strategy and Intelligence

EXPERTISE

Pricing strategy and architecture for B2B
SaaS and software products. Deal-level
margin economics and commercial model
design. Aftermarket and parts pricing
intelligence. AI-driven monetization
strategy. Renewal pricing and install base
growth. SKU structuring and discount
governance.

THE KNOWLEDGE QUADRANT FRAMEWORK

Puneet created the Knowledge Quadrant
Framework — a model for understanding
how AI displacement affects knowledge
workers. The framework maps work across
two axes: the nature of knowledge
(explicit versus tacit) and the nature
of output (accuracy versus originality).
This produces four archetypes: The
Doctors, The Builders, The Generals,
and The Creators. Within these live
eight personas ranging from The Doer
(highest AI displacement risk) to The
Oracle (minimal risk). Published as a
LinkedIn article series.

KAIROS

Puneet built Kairos — a self-inquiry tool
that applies the Knowledge Quadrant
Framework to a person's actual workday.
Users describe their day in free text.
A local AI model analyzes the narrative
and returns an honest assessment of their
quadrant blend, dominant persona,
displacement signals, and one question
to sit with. Kairos runs entirely locally
on Llama 3.2 via Ollama. No data is
stored. Currently in private beta.

WRITING

Puneet writes on LinkedIn and Medium
about AI and the future of work, pricing
strategy, leadership, and reflection.
His Knowledge Quadrant series on LinkedIn
is his flagship intellectual work.
His Medium profile is medium.com/@punsri.

CONTACT

Website: puneetsrivastava.com
Email: contact@puneetsrivastava.com
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/puneet-srivastava-2b46203
Medium: medium.com/@punsri
